timeline.title: DARPA YFA
timeline.details: Young Faculty Award for agentic defense systems. Base $500K + Director's Fellowship option for total up to $1.35M.

timeline.title: NSF CICI (IPAAI)
timeline.details: Integrity, Provenance, and Authenticity for AI-Ready Data. Up to $900K over 3 years.

timeline.title: NSF Future CoRe
timeline.details: Foundational research in IIS and cybersecurity. Awards up to $1M for 4 years.

timeline.title: CRA/Microsoft Fellowship
timeline.details: Trustworthy AI Research Fellowship for early-career scholars. 12-month program with $17K stipend.

timeline.title: AFOSR/ONR YIP Outreach
timeline.details: Initiate program officer contact for Young Investigator white papers. AFOSR: $450K/3yr, ONR: $750K/3yr.

timeline.title: Amazon ARA
timeline.details: AI for Information Security CFP. Unrestricted funds ~$80K plus AWS credits.

timeline.title: NSF CAREER
timeline.details: Cornerstone award: $400K–$500K over 5 years. Integrated research-education plan in proactive CyberAI.

timeline.title: NSF REU Site
timeline.details: Undergraduate research cohort site for CyberAI. Up to $500K over 3 years.

timeline.title: Sloan Fellowship
timeline.details: Sloan Research Fellowship nomination for early-career faculty in science and engineering.

timeline.title: NSF SaTC 2.0
timeline.details: RES designation for large-scale hacker community evolution study. Up to $1.2M for 4 years.

timeline.title: Sony Research Award
timeline.details: Focused Research Award on content protection and AI safety. Up to $150K/year.

timeline.title: DARPA YFA (2027 cycle)
timeline.details: Executive summary for the next cycle. Maintains continuous DoD engagement.

timeline.title: NSF MRI Track 2
timeline.details: Lab instrumentation for secure compute and GPU cluster. Up to $4M.

timeline.title: NSF CDSE
timeline.details: Computational and Data-Enabled Science. Scalable data pipelines and large-scale representation learning.

timeline.title: Cisco Research
timeline.details: Rolling proposals on AI for Security and Security for AI. Unrestricted research gifts.

timeline.title: NVIDIA Academic Grant
timeline.details: Quarterly deadlines for GPU compute access, cloud resources, and hardware grants.

partners.name: Cisco
partners.focus: Security for GenAI & AI for Security

partners.name: NSF
partners.program: CAREER, SaTC, Future CoRe, REU, MRI
